Hello 1753 of you @WareWolves 🐺 ❗

After 2 weeks of server explosion, I have a lot of important announcements and updates to make :wowsurprise: 

Our mod team has been working around the clock to level up the game of this server!

1. You have only 24 hrs left to claim the @ORIGINAL GANGSTA role. After that it will be gone forever 🙀

2. We are kicking off a live event called --- **Best Project of The Week 🚀**  in #🏅hall-of-fame  and vote for them by using 👍 reaction. By the end of this week projects with highest votes will get honoured 🎖️ 

3. **We have a new @QOTD role (Question Of The Day) **for engaging in spicy discussions -- dw this is not a viva, they will be random ahh questions! Get it here: #get-roles ,#❓-question-of-the-day and #❗-answer-of-the-day 

4. **🚀 Nitro boosting perks** are finally here! Get a top server role, elevated privileges, a VIP lounge with me, without the main server noise, beta access to new tools and features, private voice channels and inside news about Manware YouTube channel by boosting this server 🤯🤯🤯

5. **XP levelling systems are here!** Unlock special perks, pin messages, special channel access, top roles and even moderation access by levelling up! More info: #get-roles 

7. In case you didn't notice, we added a few channels recently including #🔥-resume-review  #find-collaborators #🖥-desk-setup 

6. Finally, **we are looking for dedicated mods!** If you're interested in implementing these upcoming features, react to this message with :anyahehehe: 
(Ps: since there might be a huge turnover for this, I will prioritize reaching out to members I already know. However, if you think you are an exceptional fit, ping me in main-chat)

Few other stuff we have planned out for future:

1. Thanking system in help channels to reward your kindness
2. @Testers role for testing your alpha/beta MVPs
3. Upcoming confidential activities that will get you features in my videos!
4. Daily tech newsletter - one place to keep you updated
5. Small bit-sized coding challenges
6. @Gamers role for ez hangout
7. More secret spicy live events :skully:
btw this is how you get @ORIGINAL GANGSTA role in <id:customize>

Hey @WareWolves 🐺 ! I keep getting asked for **free resources** constantly so I made this free resource guide!

**__Scrimba__** has been the biggest game changer in my programming journey. They are not just a course - they offer a scrim-based tutor mechanism that makes you feel like a mentor is sitting right there in your laptop guiding you through 🤯 

I *highly* *highly* recommend you guys to check out their courses on web dev and AI.

> 80% of the content on Scrimba is currently free to access and you can get 20% off with my affiliate link! https://scrimba.com/fullstack-path-c0fullstack?via=manware

Even though they are an affiliate I genuinely find their courses to be absolutely best. I have __no idea why they are still free__ :tuxohno:

embeds.title: The Fullstack Developer Path
embeds.description: Learn the entire stack from backend to frontend. Focused on hireable skills from the JavaScript ecosystem, like React, Node, Express, Next, and e

messages.content:
@chat Also we are finally releasing  #📰-newsware ! This is an initiative to keep y'all updated with all the important tech news. 

Reacting to this message with 🥸

Hey everyone! Congrats to Manware on the Scrimba sponsorship 🎉 I just wanted to share my experience—Scrimba has amazing courses on modern tech, many of them free. The solo projects are my personal favorite (Pro subscription needed, but it’s super affordable—₹800/month or ~₹300/month annually). The teachers are great, and their certificates carry real value in the industry.

A few tips from my experience: always complete the exercises in each scrim, even if they seem easy. If there’s no exercise, pause the video and experiment with the code. And definitely do the solo projects—they’re awesome for learning and can boost your portfolio instantly. Highly recommend Bob Ziroll’s React course. Have fun and keep learning!
